v1_primitives_visible.root_cause: Placeholder primitive in scene or untextured block mesh
v1_primitives_visible.do_not_repeat: Re-screenshot without replacing meshes; hiding primitive with fog
actions: Run bash tools/check_scene_visuals.sh and fix every reported primitive
Import GLB from MODEL_QA pipeline (Meshy/Tripo → Blender → export)
Re-run MODEL_QA turntable before in-scene screenshot
v1_primitives_visible.escalate: tool_tier: bump 3D gen tier; verify not using BoxMesh in .tscn

v2_muted_palette.root_cause: Candy-bright albedo, sunny sky, or wrong zone color script
v2_muted_palette.do_not_repeat: Only lowering exposure while albedo stays saturated
actions: python3 tools/palette_remap.py --zone <zone> on albedo sources
Tune WorldEnvironment fog + sky per docs/RENDERING_GUIDE.md zone row
python3 tools/check_screenshot_palette.py --zone <zone>
v2_muted_palette.escalate: Regenerate zone albedos via ComfyUI locked NPR workflow

v3_npr_not_pbr.root_cause: StandardMaterial3D PBR, HDRI sky, or glossy metallic skin
v3_npr_not_pbr.do_not_repeat: Swapping HDRI only; increasing bloom to hide PBR
actions: Assign project toon_base.gdshader family on hero meshes
Replace PhysicalSky with ProceduralSkyMaterial per zone
Disable SSIL/SSAO per RENDERING_GUIDE.md §3.2
v3_npr_not_pbr.escalate: GodotPrompter: custom zone NPR material pass

v4_japanese_coastal.root_cause: European castle kit, generic fantasy, wrong environment kit
v4_japanese_coastal.do_not_repeat: Recoloring Kenney castle assets; same Meshy prompt with 'Japanese' added once
actions: Swap mesh per docs/ENVIRONMENT_KITS.md zone module list
Regenerate set-piece with Japanese coastal / ryūgū prompt from bible
Remove models/nature/ or models/castle/ greybox paths
v4_japanese_coastal.escalate: tool_tier: new AI 3D gen with reference silhouette image

v5_silhouette_readable.root_cause: Camera too far/near, clutter, or weak mesh silhouette
actions: Re-screenshot gameplay camera distance per SC-02 checklist
Simplify foreground clutter blocking torii/character read
If turntable M4 failed too: fix mesh before camera tweak

v6_ui_clean.root_cause: Missing font, clipped Control nodes, pink placeholder
actions: Fix theme font paths in UI scenes
GameLab or procedural UI per ART_AUTOMATION_PIPELINE.md §4
GDAI: resolve Output panel font/texture errors
v6_ui_clean.escalate: Godotiq ui_map for broken Control paths

m1_not_block_primitive.root_cause: Axis-aligned block or untextured primitive exported as GLB
m1_not_block_primitive.do_not_repeat: Texturing a cube; importing Kenney greybox for ship
actions: Regenerate via Meshy/Tripo/Rodin with CHARACTER_BIBLE silhouette prompt
Blender: confirm non-box topology before export
check_model_technical.py --ship to catch greybox paths

m2_japanese_coastal_style.root_cause: Generic fantasy / European props in mesh gen
m2_japanese_coastal_style.do_not_repeat: Same prompt with one word changed
actions: Use bible prompt: muted coastal, weathered wood, ryūgū motifs
Negative prompt: castle, medieval, MMORPG armor
Reference image from ENVIRONMENT_KITS.md mood board if available
m2_japanese_coastal_style.escalate: tool_tier: higher-quality 3D gen + manual kitbash in Blender

m3_adult_not_chibi.do_not_repeat: Scaling head down in Blender without regenerating (breaks rig)
actions: Prompt: adult 1:5 proportions, not chibi, not big head
Regenerate character mesh; re-rig Mixamo
Verify side view on turntable before texture work
m3_adult_not_chibi.escalate: Manual proportion edit in Blender with rig rebind

m4_silhouette_readable.root_cause: Blob silhouette, symmetric mush, missing costume peaks
actions: Add coat tails, box strap, hat brim per CHARACTER_BIBLE §2
Blender: exaggerate silhouette before decimate
Check three_quarter turntable view specifically
m4_silhouette_readable.escalate: Sculpt pass on hero read shapes

m5_sufficient_detail.do_not_repeat: Same decimate ratio; same low-tier gen
actions: Reduce decimate ratio or skip decimate if under tris_max
tool_tier: regenerate at higher detail setting
Add edge loops on folds before bake
m5_sufficient_detail.escalate: Subdivide + sculpt wrinkles; target tris_min from qa_catalog.json

m6_matches_brief.root_cause: Wrong costume, prop identity, or missing story item read
actions: Re-read CHARACTER_BIBLE.md / ITEMS_3D_MODEL_GUIDE.md section for asset
Prompt must list distinctive features (lacquer box corners, torn torii, etc.)
Compare turntable to bible bullet list
m6_matches_brief.escalate: Kitbash correct part in Blender from second gen

actions: bash tools/generate_ai_bgm.sh --track <id> per ace_step_prompts.json
Update manifest source away from generate_game_audio.py
register_asset.py + check_audio_technical.py
a1_not_cheap_procedural.escalate: Manual ACE-Step session with curated negative prompts

a2_melancholy_coastal.root_cause: Missing melancholy coastal mood — too bright or generic
a2_melancholy_coastal.do_not_repeat: Same ACE-Step prompt with 'sad' added once
actions: Edit game/data/audio/ace_step_prompts.json — one variable (tempo OR mode OR instrumentation)
Reference AUDIO_DIRECTION.md melancholy coastal brief
A/B export 2 variants; jury both
a2_melancholy_coastal.escalate: Compose hybrid: ACE-Step stem + manual arrangement

a3_not_upbeat_pop.root_cause: Upbeat adventure, EDM, or heroic fanfare
a3_not_upbeat_pop.do_not_repeat: Only lowering tempo without changing instrumentation
actions: Add negative prompt: upbeat, EDM, fanfare, adventure
Reduce percussion and major-key keywords in ace_step_prompts.json
Compare against bgm_village reference brief
Regenerate with explicit instrumental-only prompt
ACE-Step negative: vocals, lyrics, singing
Re-run check_audio_technical.py
a4_instrumental_no_vocals.escalate: Manual edit or different model export

a5_fits_scene_mood.root_cause: Track does not match scene/category in catalog
actions: Re-read ace_step_prompts.json scene + prompt for track
Align tempo and instrumentation to zone (village vs caves vs palace)
Human A/B in Godot zone with correct BGM bus
Regenerate or reduce Blender decimate
Verify GLB is not 12-triangle placeholder

tris_above_max.root_cause: Mesh over budget for GTX 1060 target
tris_above_max.do_not_repeat: Deleting random faces without UV check
actions: Blender decimate to qa_catalog.json tris_max
Merge materials if over 8 visible per zone

textures_missing.do_not_repeat: Importing untextured mesh to Godot hoping shader fixes it
actions: ComfyUI or Material Maker albedo bake
Embed textures on GLB export in Blender
palette_remap.py before embed

greybox_banned.root_cause: Kenney/greybox path or nature kit in ship build
greybox_banned.do_not_repeat: Moving file path without replacing mesh
actions: Replace with AI 3D or approved CC0 per ASSET_COMPLIANCE.md
Run check_model_technical.py --ship
Delete stub; full regen pipeline
Confirm Blender export includes mesh + textures

lufs_out_of_range.do_not_repeat: Re-composing entire track for ±2 LU drift
actions: ffmpeg loudnorm to AUDIO_QA.md bus target
Re-run check_audio_technical.py
Limit true peak to bus table in AUDIO_QA.md
Check for inter-sample peaks after Ogg encode
ACE-Step export per ace_step_prompts.json
Update LICENSES.md + register_asset.py
